languages.text: {n}В нос бьет запах {g|Encyclopedia:Promethium}прометия{/g} и горелого мяса. Обычно людный медотсек кажется пустым и тихим. Под ногами хрустят осколки, перемешанные с кровавыми ошметками. Рядом с местом взрыва собрались блюстители. Иокаста быстро оборачивается на вас, восклицая:{/n} "Лорд-капитан! Вы уже здесь!"

traits.locale_text: {n}В нос бьет запах {g|Encyclopedia:Promethium}прометия{/g} и горелого мяса. Обычно людный медотсек кажется пустым и тихим. Под ногами хрустят осколки, перемешанные с кровавыми ошметками. Рядом с местом взрыва собрались блюстители. Иокаста быстро оборачивается на вас, восклицая:{/n} "Лорд-капитан! Вы уже здесь!"
traits.speaker: MasterofDiscipline

languages.text: {n}The smell of {g|Encyclopedia:Promethium}promethium{/g} and burned flesh stings your nostrils. The usually crowded medicae facility seems empty and quiet. Shrapnel mixed with bloody debris crunches under your feet. Enforcers cluster near the site of the explosion. Sauerback quickly turns to you, exclaiming,{/n} "Lord Captain! You're already here!"
languages.original_text: {n}В нос бьет запах {g|Encyclopedia:Promethium}прометия{/g} и горелого мяса. Обычно людный медотсек кажется пустым и тихим. Под ногами хрустят осколки, перемешанные с кровавыми ошметками. Рядом с местом взрыва собрались блюстители. Иокаста быстро оборачивается на вас, восклицая:{/n} "Лорд-капитан! Вы уже здесь!"

Enforcers cluster near the site of the explosion. Sauerback quickly turns to you, exclaiming,{/n} "Lord Captain! You're already here!"

Enforcers cluster near the site of the explosion. Sauerback quickly turns to you, exclaiming,{/n} "Lord Captain! You're already here!"

languages.text: {n}プロメチウムと焦げた肉の匂いが鼻をくすぐる。いつもは賑やかなメディベイは静かで、空っぽだ。血まみれの破片が足元で音を立てて砕ける。近衛兵が爆発現場の近くで集まっている。ザウアーバックが急いであなたに駆け寄り、叫ぶ。{/n}「艦長様！早くも到着されましたね！」
languages.original_text: {n}The smell of promethium and burned flesh stings your nostrils. The usually crowded medbay seems empty and quiet. Shrapnel mixed with bloody debris crunches under your feet. Enforcers cluster near the site of the explosion. Sauerback quickly turns to you, exclaiming,{/n} "Lord Captain! You're already here!"

traits.locale_text: プロメチウムと焦げた肉の匂いが鼻をくすぐる。いつもは賑やかなメディベイは静かで、空っぽだ。血まみれの破片が足元で音を立てて砕ける。近衛兵が爆発現場の近くで集まっている。ザウアーバックが急いであなたに駆け寄り、叫ぶ。{n}「艦長様！早くも到着されましたね！」

languages.text: {n}{g|Encyclopedia:Promethium}Prometyum{/g} ve yanmış et kokusu, burnunu sızlatıyor. Genellikle kalabalık olan sıhhiye tesisi, boş ve sessiz görünüyor. Kanlı enkazla karışık şarapnel, ayaklarının altında çıtırdıyor. İnfazcılar, patlama yerinin yakınında kümelenmiş. Sauerback hızla sana dönüyor ve haykırmaya başlıyor.{/n} "Lord Kaptan! Gelmişsiniz!"
languages.original_text: {n}The smell of {g|Encyclopedia:Promethium}promethium{/g} and burned flesh stings your nostrils. The usually crowded medicae facility seems empty and quiet. Shrapnel mixed with bloody debris crunches under your feet. Enforcers cluster near the site of the explosion. Sauerback quickly turns to you, exclaiming,{/n} "Lord Captain! You're already here!"

traits.locale_text: {n}{g|Encyclopedia:Promethium}Prometyum{/g} ve yanmış et kokusu, burnunu sızlatıyor. Genellikle kalabalık olan sıhhiye tesisi, boş ve sessiz görünüyor. Kanlı enkazla karışık şarapnel, ayaklarının altında çıtırdıyor. İnfazcılar, patlama yerinin yakınında kümelenmiş. Sauerback hızla sana dönüyor ve haykırmaya başlıyor.{/n} "Lord Kaptan! Gelmişsiniz!"

languages.text: {n}El olor del {g|Encyclopedia:Promethium}prometio{/g} y la carne quemada azota tus fosas nasales. La instalación medicae, normalmente atestada, parece vacía y silenciosa. La metralla y los escombros ensangrentados crujen bajo tus pies. Los guardias se concentran junto al lugar de la explosión. Sauerback se gira rápidamente hacia ti y exclama:{/n} «¡Lord Capitán! ¡Ya está aquí!».
languages.original_text: {n}The smell of {g|Encyclopedia:Promethium}promethium{/g} and burned flesh stings your nostrils. The usually crowded medicae facility seems empty and quiet. Shrapnel mixed with bloody debris crunches under your feet. Enforcers cluster near the site of the explosion. Sauerback quickly turns to you, exclaiming,{/n} "Lord Captain! You're already here!"

traits.locale_text: {n}El olor del {g|Encyclopedia:Promethium}prometio{/g} y la carne quemada azota tus fosas nasales. La instalación medicae, normalmente atestada, parece vacía y silenciosa. La metralla y los escombros ensangrentados crujen bajo tus pies. Los guardias se concentran junto al lugar de la explosión. Sauerback se gira rápidamente hacia ti y exclama:{/n} «¡Lord Capitán! ¡Ya está aquí!».

languages.text: {n}{g|Encyclopedia:Promethium}钷素{/g}和焦尸的恶臭刺鼻。往日拥挤的医务室此刻空荡死寂。你脚下的炸弹碎片混着血污，嘎吱作响。执法者们聚在爆炸点旁。苏尔贝克猛然回头看向你，惊呼道，{/n}“舰长大人！您来了！”
languages.original_text: {n}The smell of {g|Encyclopedia:Promethium}promethium{/g} and burned flesh stings your nostrils. The usually crowded medicae facility seems empty and quiet. Shrapnel mixed with bloody debris crunches under your feet. Enforcers cluster near the site of the explosion. Sauerback quickly turns to you, exclaiming,{/n} "Lord Captain! You're already here!"

traits.locale_text: {n}{g|Encyclopedia:Promethium}钷素{/g}和焦尸的恶臭刺鼻。往日拥挤的医务室此刻空荡死寂。你脚下的炸弹碎片混着血污，嘎吱作响。执法者们聚在爆炸点旁。苏尔贝克猛然回头看向你，惊呼道，{/n}“舰长大人！您来了！”

languages.text: {n}L'odeur du {g|Encyclopedia:Promethium}prométhium{/g} et de la chair brûlée assaille vos narines. L'installation de medicae, d'ordinaire bondée, semble vide et silencieuse. Du shrapnel mélangé à des débris ensanglantés crisse sous vos pieds. Parmi les prévôts rassemblés près du site de l'explosion, Sauerback se retourne rapidement vers vous en s'exclamant :{/n} « {mf|Seigneur-capitaine|Seigneure-capitaine} ! Vous avez fait vite ! »
languages.original_text: {n}The smell of {g|Encyclopedia:Promethium}promethium{/g} and burned flesh stings your nostrils. The usually crowded medicae facility seems empty and quiet. Shrapnel mixed with bloody debris crunches under your feet. Enforcers cluster near the site of the explosion. Sauerback quickly turns to you, exclaiming,{/n} "Lord Captain! You're already here!"

traits.locale_text: {n}L'odeur du {g|Encyclopedia:Promethium}prométhium{/g} et de la chair brûlée assaille vos narines. L'installation de medicae, d'ordinaire bondée, semble vide et silencieuse. Du shrapnel mélangé à des débris ensanglantés crisse sous vos pieds. Parmi les prévôts rassemblés près du site de l'explosion, Sauerback se retourne rapidement vers vous en s'exclamant :{/n} « {mf|Seigneur-capitaine|Seigneure-capitaine} ! Vous avez fait vite ! »

languages.text: {n}Der Geruch von {g|Encyclopedia:Promethium}Promethium{/g} und verbranntem Fleisch steigt dir in die Nase. Die sonst so geschäftige Medicae-Einrichtung scheint leer und ruhig zu sein. Unter deinen Füßen knirschen Schrapnelle und blutige Trümmer. Einige Enforcer scharen sich um den Ort der Explosion. Sauerback wirbelt zu dir herum und ruft: {/n} "Lord Captain! Ihr seid schon hier!"
